text:
Woody (ウッディ, Uddi) was a bodyguard assigned to the fourteenth prince of the Kakin Empire, Prince Woble, and her mother. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 358 In reality, he was also a spy sent by Swinko-swinko Hui Guo Rou. JUMP Ryu! Vol 21 Yoshihiro Togashi Interview Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 360 

Appearance

Woody had an oval face, a small nose, small eyes, and thin eyebrows. He had messy, light-colored hair at the top of his head. As a royal bodyguard, he wore a black suit and a tie. His corpse was shriveled-up due to the drained blood in his body.

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Woody is assigned to Queen Oito and Prince Woble for protection during the journey. Soon after the voyage started, Woody's shriveled-up corpse is found in the bathroom, and it is deemed that he died of exsanguination. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 359 After finding out he is a spy sent by one of the higher-ranked queens, Kurapika hypothesizes that he was killed by Woble's Guardian Spirit Beast when the prince felt threatened by him, although subsequent attacks of the user of Silent Majority seem to refute this theory. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 370 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Woody's face looks like that of the Japanese comedian, Udo Suzuki.
